name: iota-Carrageenan | আইওটা-ক্যারাগিনান | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications:
iota-Carrageenan Nasal Spray is indicated for -

Prophylaxis and supportive treatment of viral infections of the upper respiratory tract Shortening the duration of flu-like illnesses (e.g., influenza, coronavirus disease, etc.) and alleviate the severity of cold symptoms (e.g., runny nose, sneezing, etc.)
Relieves from congestion and runny nose
Prophylaxis and supportive treatment of all complaints resulting from dryness and irritated nasal mucosa.
pharmacology: iota-Carrageenan Nasal Spray is a unique preparation of Carrageenan which can be used to prevent and treat viral upper respiratory infections, alleviate nasal symptoms of allergic rhinitis and provide relief for dry and irritated nasal mucosa. Carrageenan is a natural carbohydrate (polysaccharide) obtained from edible red seaweeds. The name Carrageenan is derived from the Chondrus crispus species of seaweed known as Carrageen Moss or Irish Moss.The nose is the most common route of infection for viruses that trigger common cold and flu-like illness. Flu-like illnesses are caused by viruses such as rhinoviruses, coronaviruses influenza virus, adenovirus, enterovirus and respiratory syncytial virus. If viruses have penetrated into the nose, they can attach themselves to the mucous membrane and infect mucosal cells where they multiply and spread. This results in the typical symptoms of a cold, like a blocked or runny nose, sneezing, etc. iota-Carrageenan Nasal Spray (iota-Carrageenan) forms a protective barrier film against cold viruses, iota-carrageenan non specifically envelopes cold viruses and prevents their adhesion to mucous membranes. This iota-Carrageenan film remains longer on the nasal mucosa and serves as a physical barrier against external influences. Virus particles entering the nasal cavity are blocked by the viscous layer of Carrageenan, consequently they cannot infect mucosal cells. Additionally, newly synthesized virus particles excreted from infected cells are blocked from infecting new cells. This physiological moisture film supports the body’s natural defenses against cold viruses. Thereby, the reproduction and spreading of viruses responsible for infecting the airways is reduced.Low humidity and air pollution can lead to a dry nasal mucous membrane. However, the nose is only able to fulfil its filtering function if the nasal mucous membrane is sufficiently moistened. Due to the high water-binding capacity of Carrageenan, iota-Carrageenan Nasal Spray forms soft gels in the presence of water, which leads to a protecting and moisturizing film on mucosal surfaces. This film acts as a barrier against various external influences such as viruses or allergens and on the other hand, it moisturizes the mucous surfaces, which helps to keep it healthy and resilient to external influences such as dry air.
dosage:
For Adult & Children (>1 year):

For cold and flu-like infection (e.g., nasal congestion, sneezing, runny nose, etc.), spray 1-2 puff(s) 1-4 time(s) per day into each nostril
For moisturizing dry nasal mucosa, spray few puffs into the nose several times a day depending on individual requirements or as directed by the physician.
administration:
1. Shake the bottle vigorously and remove the dust cap.2. Hold the device, as shown, with your forefinger and middle finger on either side of the nozzle and your thumb underneath the bottle. Before using the nasal spray for the first time or if you have not used it for longer period, press the nasal applicator several times until a fine mist comes out from the container.3. Gently blow your nose to clear the nostrils.4. Close one nostril and carefully insert the nasal applicator into the open nostril. Tilt your head slightly forward and keep the ontainer upright. Breathe in through your nose & while breathing in, press the white collar firmly down once to release a spray.5. Breathe out through your mouth.6. Repeat the above steps in the same/other nostril for consecutive doses.Cleaning: The nasal spray should be cleaned in the following way at least once weekly.

Remove the dust cap.
Push on the white collar upward gently to detach the nasal applicator from the valve.
Wash the applicator and dust cap in warm water.
Shake off the excess water and leave to dry in a normal place. Avoid to apply additional heat.
Push the applicator back on top of the bottle and re-fix the dust cap.

If the nasal applicator becomes blocked rather than your regular wash out duringusing, repeat the whole cleaning procedure to wash the nasal applicator.Warning: Please do not use a pin or other pointed things to clean the orifice of the nasal applicator.
interaction: There are no known interactions. Studies on interactions with other products were not performed.
contraindications: At present, no other side effects besides very rare cases of hypersensitivity are known.
side_effects: At present, no other side effects besides very rare cases of hypersensitivity are known.
pregnancy__lactation: iota-Carrageenan Nasal Spray can be used during pregnancy and breast-feeding.
precautions__warnings: One spray bottle should be used by the same person only to avoid contamination (spreading germs). If nasal burning, nasal irritation or nausea occurs, discontinue use.
storage_conditions: Keep away from direct sunlight & moisture. Keep below 25°C temperature in dry place. Keep out of reach of children.
